query:
SELECT ap.id AS pdiId, ap.alunoId, ap.trilhaId, t.nome AS trilhaNome, ap.consultorId, ap.programId, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino, ap.status, ap.totalSessoesPrevistas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assessment_competencias ac WHERE ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id) AS numCompetencias
FROM assessment_pdi ap
LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id
WHERE ap.alunoId = 660014;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assessment_competencias ac WHERE ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id) AS numCompetencias
